title: dryopteris velata
intro: Dryopteris velata, also known as the veiled fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Dryopteris, commonly found in the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris velata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves or rhizomes in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
